patient_input: I've been having trouble breathing and my chest feels really tight. My heart is beating really fast and I feel extremely anxious and nervous. This happens suddenly out of nowhere.
My eyes are red and itchy, there's some white discharge coming out of my eye and it burns a lot. My vision feels a bit blurry too.
I have really bad low back pain that won't go away for weeks. It's hard to move around and my legs feel stiff. No fever though.
I've been coughing a lot and there's yellow pus in what I'm coughing up. I have fever, chills and it hurts when I breathe. Feeling very tired and weak.
My throat is very sore and swollen, and my tonsils look really red. I have a high fever and it's very painful to swallow anything.
I feel really sad and hopeless all the time. I can't sleep at night, I've lost interest in everything, and I don't feel like eating at all. My energy is very low.
I have a bad headache and my neck is very stiff. I'm sensitive to light and I have a high fever. I also feel nauseous.
My knee is really swollen and painful. It's hard to bend and I feel weakness in my knee. No rash or fever.
I keep urinating very frequently and it burns a lot when I urinate. There's some blood in my urine and I have lower abdominal pain.
I have chest pain that feels like burning, especially after eating. I get a lot of heartburn and food keeps coming back up into my throat.
My skin has a red itchy rash and it's very dry and rough. Some areas are peeling. No fever or pain.
I have been having seizures and uncontrolled shaking. Sometimes I lose consciousness suddenly without any warning. I feel confused after each episode.
I feel very dizzy and I've fainted twice this week. My heart rate feels very slow and irregular. I also feel cold and very weak.
I've been gaining a lot of weight and I feel tired all the time. My skin is very dry, I feel cold even indoors, and my memory has been getting worse lately.
I have pain and swelling in multiple joints. My joints are stiff especially in the morning. I also feel fatigued and have a mild fever.
I have sharp pain on my right side and it's hurting when I breathe deeply. I have a high fever and I'm coughing up blood.
I've been experiencing very heavy and painful periods. My lower abdomen hurts a lot, especially during my period. No unusual discharge.
I have a lump in my breast and some discharge from my nipple. My breast feels sore. I haven't had any fever or skin rash.
I can't stop worrying about everything. I have trouble concentrating and I keep having nightmares. I feel restless all the time and have no interest in things I used to enjoy.
I have a really bad headache that started suddenly at the front of my head. I also have nasal congestion and my sinuses are very painful. No ear pain.
My skin turned yellow and my eyes look yellow too. I feel very fatigued and have pain in my upper abdomen. I also lost my appetite completely.
I have been losing weight without trying to. I feel full very quickly when eating, have nausea, and my stools look black and tarry.
I have a lot of trouble focusing and I'm very hyperactive. I forget things constantly and can't sit still. This has been a problem since I was a child.
My leg is swollen, red and very painful especially in the calf area. It feels warm to touch. I don't have any fever or chest pain.
I have sudden severe chest pain that spreads to my left arm. I'm sweating a lot and feel very short of breath. I also feel nauseous and dizzy.
